title: Foundation Master Bundle
description: Composed foundation governance bundle (SP13 T-2 + T-3). Built deterministically from foundation-repo authoring pillars (governance/{frontmatter,tagging,naming,mandatory-files}-rules.json + doc-dependencies.json + file-type-contracts/*.json + _index.json) + (interim) schemas/gate-config.json by tools/build-foundation-master.sh and committed at governance/foundation-master.json. Shipped as immutable artifact to adopter ~/.claude/governance/foundation-master.json per feedback_ship_bundle_dont_build_on_consumer. SP13 T-3 extended the schema to declare 3 absorbed gate-config slots (r32_type_aliases + r32_exempt_paths + r47_tag_cap) so hooks/pre-write-guard.sh + hooks/post-write-verify.sh drop direct gate-config reads while gate-config physical retirement waits for T-6. This validator is intentionally light: structural shape only; inner pillar content is governed by each pillar's own contracts. Stricter inner-shape validation can be added under SP13 T-9 or SP14 if needed.

bundle_version.description: sha256 of the canonical-serialized bundle content (excluding _meta block itself). Same source files -> same hash. Hook bundle-read path uses this for cache-invalidation.

source_file_mtimes.description: Map of source-file path -> ISO8601 UTC mtime. Hook bundle-read path may use this for staleness detection.

deterministic_serialization.description: Note declaring the serialization discipline used (e.g., 'jq -S sorted-keys canonical JSON')

frontmatter.description: Full governance/frontmatter-rules.json content (SP13 T-4 absorbed types + tiers + path_routing + archetype enum/fields)

tagging.description: Full governance/tagging-rules.json content (SP13 T-4 canonical taxonomy)

doc_dependencies.description: Full governance/doc-dependencies.json content (SP13 T-4 first-class authoring pillar per feedback_doc_deps_first_class)

file_type_contracts.description: Map of file-type-name -> contract object. Each key matches a file in governance/file-type-contracts/<name>.json (k8s paramKind pattern; matcher in mandatory-files-rules.json mandates.<file_type>). SP03 Session 20 shipped _index.md as first instance.

_index.description: Full governance/_index.json content (pillar registry + cross-cutting meta-rules + dissolved_schemas registry)

r47_exempt_paths_composed.description: Deterministic union of R-47 exempt-paths from all contributing pillars (SP13 T-4: tagging-rules.json#r47_exempt_paths is the canonical declaration; gate-config.json contributes interim entries until T-6 retirement). Deduped + sorted for deterministic ordering.

r32_type_aliases.description: SP13 T-3: alias-type → canonical-type map (e.g. {"skill-spec": "reference"}). Lifted verbatim from gate-config.json#r32.type_aliases per freeze-with-marker discipline; hooks read this top-level slot. Interim location until SP13 T-6 pillar-shard decides final resting (frontmatter-rules.json#types.<canonical>.aliases is the leading candidate per the type-registry inversion +1 option).

r32_exempt_paths.description: SP13 T-3: R-32 type-check exempt globs. Lifted verbatim from gate-config.json#r32.exempt_paths per freeze-with-marker discipline; distinct from r47_exempt_paths_composed (R-32 is the type-allowlist gate; R-47 is the tag-conformance gate). Interim location until SP13 T-6 pillar-shard.

r47_tag_cap.description: SP13 T-3: per-file tag count cap. Lifted from gate-config.json#r47.tag_cap; default 25. Interim location until SP13 T-6 pillar-shard relocates to tagging-rules.json#taxonomy.

types.description: Convenience lift: governance/frontmatter-rules.json#types block surfaced at top level for hook fast-path. Mirrors frontmatter.types exactly; deterministic build asserts equality at compose time.
